title: Pace residual trend versus field
summary: First residualize lap-time delta against same-race-lap field pace, then compute prior-only driver trends.
rationale: Raw lap-time delta can be contaminated by lap-wide effects. Some low-to-mid variants attempted field-residual rolling features; a cleaner residual-first approach may isolate driver-specific tyre decline.
implementation_hint: Compute same-race-lap median `LapTime_Delta`, subtract it from each row to form a pace residual, then within each driver-race sequence compute shifted rolling residual level, recent maximum, and residual slope. Preserve row order.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with low-medium confidence.
risk: Same-lap field aggregation is contemporaneous and target-free but must be carefully aligned; rolling residuals can still overfit noise.
